chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّهُ لَا يُشَفَّعُ فِي حَدٍّ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 57 – There is no intercession regarding a Penalty (Hadd)

text: كَانَ أُسَامَةُ بْنُ زَيْدٍ يَشْفَعُ فِي الشَّيْ‏ءِ الَّذِي لَا حَدَّ فِيهِ فَأُتِيَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) بِإِنْسَانٍ قَدْ وَجَبَ عَلَيْهِ حَدٌّ فَشَفَعَ لَهُ أُسَامَةُ فَقَالَ لَهُ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) لَا يُشَفَّعُ فِي حَدٍّ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Aban Bin Usman, from Salma,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘Asama Bin Zayd used to intercede regarding the thing in which there was no Penalty (Hadd) (applicable). So they came to Rasool-Allahsaww with a person upon whom a Penalty (Hadd) was Obligated, so Asama interceded for him. So Rasool-Allahsaww said to him: ‘There is not intercession regarding a Penalty (Hadd)’.
